text.title: Service Bootstrap Checklist Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: New svc-refunds service. Scaffold from platform template. 12-item walk: repo (alice), CI (bob), logging (alice), metrics (carol), healthcheck (alice), runbook (carol), on-call rota (eve), dashboards (carol), alerts (carol), secrets (frank), deploy (bob), postmortem template (carol). All done with evidence_links. Platform lead opens LB traffic gate.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
